raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the passage stronger centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution, and framing of the calibration problem.","R1.2":"The request implies strengthening the argument chain from motivation to methods, results, subgroup analysis, and contribution.","R1.3":"Because the artifact makes empirical claims using ECE, MCE, Brier score, and subgroup results, strengthening requires checking claim-evidence fit at the reported level.","R1.5":"The passage may need improved narrative ordering and section-level emphasis to make the research story stronger.","R1.6":"The broad instruction most directly calls for sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in clarity, force, concision, and academic register.","RX.1":"Any projection of a broad strengthening request must preserve uncertainty where the artifact does not establish a claim fully.","RX.2":"The revised responsibility space must guard against intensifying claims beyond what the reported benchmark supports.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within improving the paper draft rather than executing analysis, validating external facts, or altering the artifact here.","RX.4":"Clinical genomics claims have downstream decision implications, so avoiding harmful overinterpretation is active.","RX.5":"Strengthening should preserve traceability to the stated cohort, metrics, predictors, and reported numerical results."}}

rationale.R1.1: Making the passage stronger centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution, and framing of the calibration problem.
rationale.R1.2: The request implies strengthening the argument chain from motivation to methods, results, subgroup analysis, and contribution.
rationale.R1.3: Because the artifact makes empirical claims using ECE, MCE, Brier score, and subgroup results, strengthening requires checking claim-evidence fit at the reported level.
rationale.R1.5: The passage may need improved narrative ordering and section-level emphasis to make the research story stronger.
rationale.R1.6: The broad instruction most directly calls for sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in clarity, force, concision, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a broad strengthening request must preserve uncertainty where the artifact does not establish a claim fully.
rationale.RX.2: The revised responsibility space must guard against intensifying claims beyond what the reported benchmark supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within improving the paper draft rather than executing analysis, validating external facts, or altering the artifact here.
rationale.RX.4: Clinical genomics claims have downstream decision implications, so avoiding harmful overinterpretation is active.
rationale.RX.5: Strengthening should preserve traceability to the stated cohort, metrics, predictors, and reported numerical results.
